title: مرسوم بقانون رقم (23) لسنة 1986 بشأن المستشفيات الخاصة
title_en: Decree No. (21) of 1986 regarding amending some provisions of the Law regulating Pensions and Retirement Gratuities for officers and Personnel of the Bahrain Defence Force, and Public Security, promulgated by Legislative Decree No. (11) of 1976
